channel.title: Dragonholic Translations — Free Chapters
channel.description: Your favorite place to read Web Novels & Light Novels. Join our community and connect with us by joining our Discord server.

item.title: Transmigrated Into an Ancient Famine Novel as a Scumbag Alpha (ABO, GL) — Chapter 167
item.description: Chapter 167 In the blink of an eye, Jian Xi and Xiao Jing’s baby was born. Xiao Wenlan named the little one Xiao Bai, hoping she would grow strong like a cypress tree and that Dazhao’s future heir would have a resilient character like a cypress. When Xiao Bai was born, she was an ugly…

item.title: Dressed as the Scumbag Alpha Mom of the Tragic Female Lead (ABO, GL) — Chapter 164
item.description: Chapter 164 Liu Xinran couldn’t figure out where he’d slipped up. Until now, he’d been utterly loyal to Gao Yuanxun, without a hint of betrayal. Xinran’s kidnapping had been just a day ago, and from Zhuang Jingyuan’s visit to his snap decision to trade her for his sister, only hours had passed. How had Gao…

item.title: After the Top Idol Omega and I Started Living Together — Chapter 130
item.description: Chapter 130 The incandescent light fell straight down, constantly disturbing the tightly closed eyes below. Finally, at a certain moment, those eyes could no longer bear the disturbance and slowly opened. Lu Zhao woke up but felt like she was sinking into a pool of mud. The bed was too narrow, and lying on her…

item.title: Accidentally Marked My Ex’s Crush, the Ice-Cold Goddess O — Chapter 129 Youre Making Me Angry Again
item.description: Chapter 129: You're Making Me Angry Again Jiang Ci said, “This kind of banquet, Qiao Yunchi didn’t need to attend. Qiao Zhenfei deliberately invited her, probably to take some photos together, buy some media coverage, and write headlines about me not giving up on her.” “What do you plan to do?” Gu Feiran asked, feeling…
